title: The Wandering Jew
writer: E. Temple Thurston, H. Fowler Mear
actors: Conrad Veidt, Marie Ney, Basil Gill
plot: Conrad Veidt stars as the Jew who urges Roman authorities to crucify Jesus and release Barabbas. As a punishment, he is condemned by God to wander the Earth for many centuries, enduring innumerable trials and tribulations on sever...
